final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(*) begin
  if (write_enable) begin memory <= data_in ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  if (read_enable) begin data_out <= memory ; // Read data from memory
  end
  end
endmodule
